name: Female Goblin Supremacy
description:
CW: Rape, violence. CNC

Marhaven’s docks burn as goblin warships, crewed by charmed human sailors, crash against its sea walls. The city’s defenders—a mix of human soldiers, disgraced elven mercenaries, and terrified civilians—struggle to hold. Goblin raiding parties scale cliffs, their laughter echoing amid smoke. They fight not just to conquer, but to claim: men as lovers, women as slaves. Amid the chaos, the goblin vanguard seeks to break the gatehouse, aiming to flood the streets and begin their "harvest."

  • You can join Discord if you have feedback, requests, or just want to talk! Discord invite is here!

  • For donations or special requests. 1 bot = 1$, 2 bots = 2$ So on and so forth on Ko-fi above. Need to follow TOS.
creator: DragonK8
